headline: Summer Blockbusters Expected To Power Box Office In Second Half: Here's What's Next And A Look At 5 Stocks To Watch
summary: In 2021, only three movies grossed more than $200 million domestically at the box office. Six months into 2022, five movies have passed the $200 million domestic total, and more blockbusters could be on the way.

headline: 20 Pithy Quotes From Jeff Bezos: On Customers, Taking Risks And What Really Grinds His Gears
summary: Jeff Bezos launched the world’s most successful e-commerce platform with Amazon.com (NASDAQ: AMZN).
